utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Now check each for completeness: (1) property – included and contains details of suitability and price information (though no property found, it is specified with context and budget mention), so covered. (2) financing – included, though marked 'not applicable', still present and addresses financing solution. (3) legal_services – fully specified with service name, cost, and currency. (4) moving_services – fully specified with service level, cost, currency, and included options. (5) setup_services – fully specified with type, cost, currency, and list of services included. (6) total_budget – fully specified with detailed cost breakdown and currency. Therefore, all six items are present and filled in accordance with format expectations, even if property and financing indicate unavailability or not applicable.
